title: Ultimate Misery
description: Ultimate Misery turns Minecraft into pure chaos. Each round adds a random restriction like no walking no crafting reversed controls or 1 HP. Built for challenges multiplayer and hardcore survival.
body:
# 🔥 Ultimate Misery

Ultimate Misery is a random challenge mod that applies brutal gameplay restrictions. Challenges can be rolled randomly or assigned by command. Built for hardcore runs, multiplayer chaos, and challenge content. 💀

# 🎯 Challenges
- 🚫 **No Walking** — walking is disabled
- ⛏️🚫 **No Breaking Blocks** — blocks cannot be broken
- 🛠️🚫 **No Crafting** — crafting is disabled
- 🧱🚫 **No Building** — blocks cannot be placed
- 🦘🚫 **No Jumping** — jumping is disabled
- 🔄 **Reversed Controls** — mouse and movement keys are inverted
- ❤️‍🔥 **One HP** — you have only one heart
- 🌊 **Water Dependent** — you must keep your air supply up or suffer
- 🧛 **Vampire Mode** — harsh penalties in sunlight, survive in the dark

# ⚙️ Config (Keybind)
- **N** — opens the config screen where you can:
  - enable/disable reroll
  - set reroll interval
  - disable specific challenges

# 🧾 Commands
- **/givechallenges random** — assigns random challenges to all players
- **/givechallenges random <targets>** — assigns random challenges to selected players
- **/givechallenges <challenge_name>** — assigns a specific challenge to all players
- **/givechallenges <challenge_name> <targets>** — assigns a specific challenge to selected players
- **/givechallenges stop** — removes challenges from everyone
- **/givechallenges stop <targets>** — removes challenges from selected players

Example:
**/givechallenges NO_JUMP**
